title: pelargonium × rutilum
intro: Pelargonium × rutilum, also known as Scarlet Bugloss or Red Bugloss, is a flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family, which is a hybrid of the South African Pelargonium species. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant are used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × rutilum include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and sore throats. The leaves can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
